title: Ability to see multiple Workspaces in sidebar along with boards
excerpt: I’d love the ability to have the Workspaces, as well as their respective boards, on the sidebar menu so they are easier to navigate between. :grimacing:

posts.author: EchoD75 (Ed Burch)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love the ability to have the Workspaces, as well as their respective boards, on the sidebar menu so they are easier to navigate between.
